description.content: Operations for managing ticket associations

Operations for managing ticket records
Returns a page of ticket records. Use the limit and after parameters to paginate through tickets. You can also specify which properties to return using the properties parameter.

query.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.
The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.
A comma-separated list of property names to return.

response.name: Successful response with a list of tickets.

Tickets represent customer requests for help and are tracked through support pipelines until resolved. The tickets endpoints allow you to create, manage, and retrieve customer support ticket records and associate them with contacts, companies, and other CRM objects.

Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support
